body_excerpt: {"credits": [], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-40976", "cvss": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 9.1, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-862", "name": "Missing Authorization"}], "description": "In certain circumstances, Spring Boot's default web security is ineffective allowing unauthorized access to all endpoints. For an application to be vulnerable, it must: be a servlet-based web application; have no Spring Security configuration of its own and rely on the default web security filter chain; depend on spring-boot-actuator-autoconfigure; not depend on spring-boot-health. If any of the above does not apply, the application is not vulnerable.\n\nAffected: Spring Boot 4.0.0–4.0.5; upgrade to 4.0.6 or later per vendor advisory.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00489, "percentile": 0.38504}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-8v8j-3hxp-93wr", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-06T18:54:08Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8v8j-3hxp-93wr", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-8v8j-3hxp-93wr"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-40976"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-04-28T00:16:24Z", "published_at": "2026-04-28T00:31:41Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-40976", "https://spring.io/security/cve-2026-40976", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-8v8j-3hxp-93wr"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-boot", "summary": "Spring Boot's default security filter chain has no authorization rule with Actuator but without Health", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T18:54:08Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-8v8j-3hxp-93wr", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "4.0.6", "package": {"ecosystem": "maven", "name": "org.springframework.boot:spring-boot"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 4.0.0, < 4.0.6"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Spring Boot's default security filter chain has no authorization rule with Actuator but without Health
